title: WU-010: Quota-Wise Mode
description: Add normal/wise mode policy so users can conserve free quota, lower defaults, warn before expensive fan-out, and halt clearly when declared/local free quota is exhausted.
acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] FREELLMPOOL_MODE=wise changes defaults in tests without breaking explicit --model, --providers, --max-tokens, or --routing.
- [ ] quota-wise status reports local headroom and one recommended mode.
- [ ] Exhausted declared quota returns a clear non-zero result and does not call paid providers.
- [ ] Interactive expensive operations prompt; non-interactive mode fails clearly.
- [ ] Verification: python3 -m pytest tests/test_mode.py tests/test_cli.py tests/test_roles.py tests/test_quota.py

title: WU-006: Second-Opinion Everywhere
description: Create a shared bounded panel primitive used by ask --second-opinion, battle, recipes, reports, playground, and MCP. Prefer distinct providers and model families where metadata exists.
acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] panel.py returns structured answer records with provider/model, latency, text, and error.
- [ ] ask --second-opinion prints at least two model answers and optional synthesis with fake providers.
- [ ] Synthesis failure is non-fatal.
- [ ] Cross-family tests avoid same-family reruns when alternatives exist.
- [ ] MCP panel tests cover the same helper.
- [ ] Verification: python3 -m pytest tests/test_panel.py tests/test_cli.py tests/test_mcp.py tests/test_battle.py

title: WU-002: Init Wizard
description: Add freellmpool init and freellmpool init --agent metaswarm --tailnet. Detect providers, keys, agent CLIs, Tailscale, existing proxy config, and generate copy-pastable setup commands without clobbering existing config.
acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] Interactive and non-interactive init paths are implemented.
- [ ] Init is idempotent and does not clobber existing files without --force.
- [ ] Missing providers/keys/Tailscale produce actionable output.
- [ ] Metaswarm/Tailnet setup path prints working commands.
- [ ] Verification: python3 -m pytest tests/test_init_wizard.py tests/test_cli.py tests/test_agents.py

title: WU-003: Agent Profiles and Metaswarm Profile
description: Introduce explicit agent profiles and profile commands. Include metaswarm, opencode, codex, cline, cursor, claude, aider, and continue. Preserve current freellmpool code <agent> compatibility.
acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] profile list/show/install/doctor commands work.
- [ ] Metaswarm profile documents one free/cheap worker lane, larger reviewer lane, Codex escalation, and Opus final-review only.
- [ ] Profiles include client_kind, base_url, role map, model family, cost_class, snippets, and doctor checks.
- [ ] Explicit paid providers are never selected silently.
- [ ] Verification: python3 -m pytest tests/test_profiles.py tests/test_agents.py tests/test_cli.py tests/test_proxy.py

title: WU-004: Role-Based Asking
description: Add roles instead of model IDs: coder, critic, summarizer, long-context, cheap, fast, second-opinion. Add ask --role and ask --routing support without inventing a second routing engine.
acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] freellmpool roles lists useful role descriptions.
- [ ] ask --role coder passes expected routing, token, and system hints.
- [ ] ask --routing quality is tested and defaults are preserved when omitted.
- [ ] Explicit --model and --providers continue to win and are visible in provenance.
- [ ] Verification: python3 -m pytest tests/test_roles.py tests/test_cli.py tests/test_routing.py
close_reason: 4-phase loop complete. Validation passed; fresh Codex reviewers and MiniMax M3 passed.

title: Epic: Product UX + Tailnet plan
description:
Implement the approved Product UX + Tailnet plan for freellmpool.

Scope: turn freellmpool into a useful local AI appliance with first-run setup, Tailnet gateway, agent profiles, roles, battle/playground, recipes, reports, jobs, quota-wise mode, MCP UX, and release-ready docs.

Source of truth: docs/PRODUCT_UX_TAILNET_PLAN.md. Persisted plan: .beads/plans/active-plan.md.
acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] WU-001 through WU-012 are complete.
- [ ] Each work unit passes its listed verification commands.
- [ ] Adversarial review passes for each work unit.
- [ ] Final Opus pre-ship review passes before pushing/merging/releasing.
- [ ] No silent paid routing, rate-limit bypass, hidden telemetry, or unauthenticated Tailnet exposure is introduced.

title: WU-001: Tailnet Gateway Mode
description: Add authenticated Tailnet/LAN gateway commands and safe proxy binding behavior. Files: cli.py, proxy.py, new tailnet.py, tests for CLI/proxy/tailnet. Must degrade gracefully when tailscale is unavailable or logged out.
acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] freellmpool tailnet status reports usable/missing/logged-out states.
- [ ] freellmpool tailnet serve prefers Tailnet IPv4 and prints client setup commands.
- [ ] Non-loopback/Tailnet serving requires auth by default.
- [ ] Unsafe binds are refused unless explicitly acknowledged.
- [ ] Fake/offline tests cover missing tailscale, logged-out tailscale, malformed output, and unsafe binds.
- [ ] Verification: python3 -m pytest tests/test_tailnet.py tests/test_cli.py tests/test_proxy.py

title: WU-011: MCP UX Tools
description: Expose the new UX through MCP: roles, recipes, battle, second-opinion, tailnet info, and quota-wise helpers. Keep tools explicit and avoid secret leakage.
acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] New MCP tools are listed in mcp_server.py, docs, listings, and server.json where appropriate.
- [ ] Tools reuse shared helpers instead of duplicate dispatch logic.
- [ ] MCP outputs never expose provider keys or local bearer tokens.
- [ ] Tailnet info degrades gracefully when tailscale is absent.
- [ ] Verification: python3 -m pytest tests/test_mcp.py tests/test_roles.py tests/test_recipes.py tests/test_battle.py; python3 -m pytest tests/test_mcp_listings.py

title: WU-012: Docs and Release Readiness
description: Update README, integration docs, MCP docs/listings, agent docs, roadmap, and release checks so public claims match shipped commands and safety constraints.
acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] README has copy-pastable Tailnet and Metaswarm paths.
- [ ] Docs explain roles, quota-wise mode, battle/playground, second-opinion, recipes, jobs, and reports.
- [ ] Provider claims keep caveats about upstream prompts, free-tier drift, and no rate-limit bypass.
- [ ] Release checks reflect new public commands and stdlib-first guard.
- [ ] Verification: python3 -m pytest tests/test_faq.py tests/test_agents.py tests/test_cli.py; python3 scripts/check_release_ready.py

title: WU-009: Local Job Queue
description: Add local foreground job queue for slow, quota-aware background work. Queue is append-only JSONL with tombstone/cancel records and report output for completed jobs.
acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] jobs add/list/run/watch commands work.
- [ ] Queue survives process restart.
- [ ] Cancelled jobs remain cancelled after replay.
- [ ] Failed jobs preserve errors and do not block unrelated jobs.
- [ ] jobs run --dry-run shows what would run.
- [ ] Verification: python3 -m pytest tests/test_jobs.py tests/test_reports.py tests/test_recipes.py

title: WU-007: Recipes
description: Ship useful JSON recipe workflows: second-opinion, pr-review, repo-summary, launch-copy-critic, and metaswarm-worker-review. Include package data in builds.
acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] recipe list/show/run commands work.
- [ ] Bundled JSON recipes are included in wheel/sdist metadata.
- [ ] Bad recipe names and missing inputs produce clear errors.
- [ ] Recipes reuse Pool.ask, battle, or panel helpers.
- [ ] Verification: python3 -m pytest tests/test_recipes.py tests/test_cli.py; python3 -m build or release metadata check if package data changes.

title: WU-008: Reports
description: Add append-only RunRecord artifacts and Markdown/HTML reports for battles, recipes, jobs, and cost/quota audit output. HTML must be escaped, redacted, and self-contained.
acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] report last/list/open commands work.
- [ ] RunRecord supports battle, recipe, job, and second-opinion output.
- [ ] freellmpool cost show <run-id> is covered by fake RunRecord tests.
- [ ] HTML reports escape untrusted text and reject external assets.
- [ ] Redaction covers obvious API key and bearer token shapes.
- [ ] Verification: python3 -m pytest tests/test_reports.py tests/test_battle.py tests/test_recipes.py

title: WU-005: Battle CLI and Local Playground
description: Make model comparison tangible with freellmpool battle and a framework-free local playground served by the proxy. Reuse the shared panel helper once available.
acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] battle works with fake providers and prints side-by-side Markdown.
- [ ] /playground renders without external assets.
- [ ] POST /freellmpool/battle enforces proxy auth.
- [ ] Per-model failures do not fail the whole battle.
- [ ] Verification: python3 -m pytest tests/test_battle.py tests/test_proxy.py tests/test_cli.py
